sizing_rule.note: Portfolio optimization via constrained Lagrangian system solving for optimal allocation weights (X₁, X₂, X₃, X₄) across multiple investments. Uses first-order partial derivatives and covariance matrix to determine position sizing that maximizes risk-adjusted returns subject to 100% allocation and expected return constraints. No explicit f-value provided (AUTHOR_SILENT); implementation requires numerical solution of augmented matrix system.

source_rule_text: Optimize portfolio position sizing across multiple investments by solving a system of linear equations that constrains total investment to 100% while satisfying expected return and covariance relationships.
